title: boqer #1242
definition:
1) morning, break of day
    1a) morning
        1a1) of end of night
        1a2) of coming of daylight
        1a3) of coming of sunrise
        1a4) of beginning of day
        1a5) of bright joy after night of distress (fig.)
    1b) morrow, next day, next morning
